title: scanner.rs mixes into_option().expect() and Option::from() for CtOption conversion
description: scanner.rs line 210: uses fr.into_option().expect(...) to unwrap a CtOption<Fr>. The rest of the codebase (lines 471, 867, 890) consistently uses Option::from(node).expect(...). The two forms are semantically equivalent but the inconsistency means a future contributor looking for CtOption usage will miss line 210 when grepping for Option::from. Fix: replace .into_option().expect() with Option::from(...).expect() to match the established pattern.
